FELIXXCONTENTPACK-FOSSILIZED_HELIX.descr: Prevent the first time you would lose HP in combat.

FELIXXCONTENTPACK-TINY_HOUSE.title: Tiny House

FELIXXCONTENTPACK-DEAD_BRANCH.descriptio: Every [blue]2[/blue] times you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, add a random card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
FELIXXCONTENTPACK-DEAD_BRANCH.title: Dead Branch
FELIXXCONTENTPACK-SINGING_BOWL.descripti: Whenever you enter a [gold]?[/gold] room, gain [blue]2[/blue] Max HP.
FELIXXCONTENTPACK-SINGING_BOWL.title: Singing Bowl
FELIXXCONTENTPACK-BIRD_URN.description: Create an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] copy of the first [gold]Power[/gold] you play each turn that costs 1 more.
